scripts.sonar:check: node -e "process.env.SONAR_TOKEN ? console.log('✅ SONAR_TOKEN is set') : (console.error('❌ SONAR_TOKEN not found. Run: source .env.sonar'), process.exit(1))"
scripts.sonar:local: bash -c '[ -f .env.sonar ] && source .env.sonar && npx sonarqube-scanner -Dsonar.token=${SONAR_TOKEN} || (echo "❌ .env.sonar not found" && exit 1)'
scripts.sonar:branch: bash -c '[ -f .env.sonar ] && source .env.sonar; npx sonarqube-scanner -Dsonar.branch.name=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) -Dsonar.token=${SONAR_TOKEN}'
scripts.sonar:report:pdf: echo '⚠️  PDF generation requires additional setup (wkhtmltopdf). Generating HTML report instead...' && npm run sonar:report
scripts.sonar:full: cd frontend && npm run test:coverage -- --passWithNoTests || true && cd .. && npm run sonar:local && echo '⏳ Waiting for SonarQube to process results...' && sleep 10 && npm run sonar:report
scripts.sonar:full:unit: cd frontend && npm run test:coverage && cd .. && npm run sonar:local && sleep 10 && npm run sonar:report
